calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Continued To Jul-15-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Defendants Default Under Settlement And Release Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-12-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF TRUIST BANK'S MOTION FOR ENTERING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO DEFENDANT'S DEFAULT UNDER SETTLEMENT AND RELEASE AGREEMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar as moot in light of the court's order of January 26, 2026, granting the same relief. Moving party is directed to prepare a proposed order setting out the court's January 26 tentative verbatim, and to separately submit and serve a proposed judgment. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2026 Continued To May-13-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Continued To Mar-11-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Defendant'S Default Under Settlement And Release Agreement
Off Calendar Jan-26-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF TRUIST BANK'S Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Defendant's Default Under Settlement And Release Agreement.

The unopposed motion for entry of judgment is granted for good cause shown. Plaintiff shall submit and serve a proposed judgment.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
